channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. International Collaboration Helps Pinpoint Universe’s Expansion Rate  NASA Science (.gov)

item.description:
1. What if Dark Matter Is Actually Black Holes From Another Universe?  ScienceAlert
  2. Dark Matter May Be Made of Black Holes From Another Universe  WIRED
  3. Exploding black holes could explain an antimatter mystery  Science News
  4. Dark matter could explain the earliest supermassive black holes  Phys.org
  5. Could dark matter be made of black holes from a different universe?  The Conversation

item.title: 9,000-Year-Old Structures Deep Beneath the Great Lakes Reveal Archaeological Evidence of an Ancient “Lost World” - The Debrief
item.description: 9,000-Year-Old Structures Deep Beneath the Great Lakes Reveal Archaeological Evidence of an Ancient “Lost World”  The Debrief

item.title: This New Produce Wash Removes 96% of Pesticides — Far More Than Water or Baking Soda - Food & Wine
item.description:
1. This New Produce Wash Removes 96% of Pesticides — Far More Than Water or Baking Soda  Food & Wine
  2. New fruit wash removes 94% pesticides, keeps grapes fresh 15 days at room temp  Interesting Engineering
  3. A new fruit wash removes pesticides and extends shelf life  Phys.org
  4. Biodegradable wash keeps grapes fresh for 2 weeks at room temperature  Popular Science
  5. UBC researchers create fruit wash that keeps produce fresh longer  CTV News
